name: Love's Travel Stop #243
description: Love's travel center at I-10 Exit 43 (Hwy 383) with diesel fueling lanes, truck parking, showers, a Hardee's, and an on-site CAT Scale.

name: Pilot Travel Center #1051
description: Pilot travel center at I-10 Exit 43 across from Love's, with diesel lanes, truck parking, showers, an Arby's/PJ Fresh, laundry, and a CAT Scale.

name: Delta Town Truck Stop
description: Independent truck stop near I-10 Exit 4 in Vinton offering diesel, truck parking, a deli/restaurant, showers, and engine repair.

name: Mission Fuel - Sulphur
description: Independent fuel and truck stop off I-10 Exit 20 in Sulphur with truck parking, showers, and driver services; the site has operated under more than one brand, so the current phone is left blank.

name: Jennings Travel Plaza
description: Independent travel plaza at I-10 Exit 64 in Jennings with truck parking, a cafe, showers, laundry, a driver lounge, and scales.

name: Petro Stopping Center - Egan
description: Full-service Petro/TA travel center at I-10 Exit 76 in Egan (between Jennings and Crowley) with diesel lanes, 120-plus truck parking spaces, showers, restaurants, laundry, a scale, and truck service.

name: Exit 80 Travel Plaza (Citgo)
description: Independent Citgo-branded travel plaza at I-10 Exit 80 in Crowley with diesel, truck parking, a restaurant/deli, showers, laundry, a lounge, and certified scales.

name: TA Truck Service - Egan
description: On-site truck service and tire-repair shop at the Petro Egan travel center at I-10 Exit 76, offering tire and roadside repair for commercial trucks.

name: Love's Travel Stop #523
description: Love's travel center just off I-10 exit 92 in Duson, west of Lafayette, with a CAT Scale and truck service bays.

name: TA Lafayette
description: TravelCenters of America full-service travel center off I-10 in Lafayette with truck service bays and showers.

name: Pilot Travel Center #274
description: Pilot travel center at I-10 exit 109 in Breaux Bridge with a CAT Scale, showers and an on-site Arby's.

name: Frog City Travel Plaza
description: Independent 24-hour travel plaza at I-10 exit 87 in Rayne with fuel lanes, showers and truck parking.

name: Silvers Travel Plaza & Casino
description: Independent truck plaza with a video-poker casino and Cajun deli near I-10 exit 109 in Breaux Bridge.

name: Henderson Travel Plaza
description: Truck plaza at I-10 exit 115 at the edge of the Atchafalaya Basin offering truck parking, laundry and a trucker lounge.

name: Tiger Truck Stop
description: Long-running family truck stop at I-10 exit 139 in Grosse Tete on the east side of the Atchafalaya Basin.

name: Southern Tire Mart - Scott
description: Commercial truck and trailer tire dealer in Scott near the I-10 Ambassador Caffery interchange.
